arts.ttl: Toulouse predicted XI v Saint-Étienne: Rasmus Nicolaisen out, Joshua King to start
arts.sum: Toulouse FC remain without Rasmus Nicolaisen, as they will until the end of the calendar year, as they prepare to take on AS Saint-Étienne on Friday night. He is the…

Toulouse lost at Monaco last week but they should feel confident about getting back to winning ways having won their last two at home. Saint-Etienne have been dire on their travels this season having...
